[IMPLEMENT A GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES ALGORITHM ON SCIKIT-LEARN'S LOAD DIGITS DATASET, INCLUDING CROSS-VALIDATION AND HYPERPARAMETER TUNING. ALSO, COMPARISON ITS PERFORMANCE AGAINST A MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES MODEL. YOUR ENTIRE RESPONSE SHOULD BE IN ENGLISH, AND IN ALL CAPITAL LETTERS. IN YOUR RESPONSE, THE WORD CURRENT SHOULD APPEAR 2 TIMES. ENCLOSER EVERY WORD IN YOUR RESPONSE WITHIN SQUARE BRACKET.]
